task_description: Implement Phase 2 of ThreatOne: Build the real Scanner Engine with file hashing, signature database, signature matching, YARA rule engine (stubbed), scan scheduler (thread pool), scan types (Quick/Full/Custom/Memory/IOC), file enumeration, progress tracking, quarantine manager, and scan history. Replace the existing ScanEngine stub with a fully functional scan orchestrator.

verification.summary: cmake configures and builds cleanly (zero errors, one pre-existing warning in test_service_locator from nodiscard). All tests pass (1/1 test executable, 35+ test cases covering core, database, and scanner modules). Tests verify SHA256 against FIPS known vectors, signature DB CRUD and JSON loading, file enumeration with exclusions, quarantine lifecycle, and full scan engine integration with threat detection. Review passed on v2 (APPROVED).
